result.changesSummary: balance.json: inserted "enemy_weak" and "endless" sections between "enemy_basic" and "fight", matching the existing compact multi-key-per-line formatting, with exact spec keys/values (enemy_weak: hp_max 70, chip_multiplier 0.34, threat 14/18, recovery 14/22, idle 24/56, strong_probability 0.05, stagger_ticks 18, exhausted_ticks 48; endless: scale_step 0.06, scale_cap 1.5, strong_prob_bonus_cap 0.15, threat floors 4/6, recovery floors 2/4, banner_ticks 24, kill_score_per_wave 50). All existing sections untouched; JSON validated with python3 json.load. balance.gd: added `var enemy_weak: Dictionary = {}` (kept as dict, NOT flattened, with Czech+EN comment explaining the collision rationale) and the nine flat endless_* vars with spec defaults (endless_scale_step, endless_scale_cap, endless_strong_prob_bonus_cap, endless_threat_weak_floor, endless_threat_strong_floor, endless_recovery_weak_floor, endless_recovery_strong_floor, endless_banner_ticks, endless_kill_score_per_wave). _load_balance() now does `enemy_weak = data.get("enemy_weak", {}) as Dictionary` and parses an "endless" dict using the same int()/float() get-with-self-default pattern as existing sections. TAB indentation preserved.

hud.gd updated for endless mode: (1) update() resigned to the exact 13-arg contract signature — p_show_win removed, p_wave/p_score/p_banner_ticks appended after p_max_combo; show_win var replaced by wave/score/banner_ticks vars. (2) _on_canvas_draw() now starts with a top-left readout (font 20, y 36/58/80): "WAVE %d", "SCORE %d" in COLOR_TEXT and "MAX COMBO %d [%s]" colored via existing _rank_for/_rank_color. (3) The entire VYHRA win-overlay block (dim rect, VYHRA label, Space hint, max-combo line) deleted. (4) New centered WAVE banner: drawn while banner_ticks > 0, "WAVE %d" at font 72, mid-screen, color Color(1.0, 0.95, 0.5, alpha) with alpha = float(banner_ticks) / float(maxi(1, Balance.endless_banner_ticks)) — pure fade-out. Debug state text, key hints, and the top-center combo+rank block are unchanged. Header comment updated; TAB indentation and comment style preserved. Verified no show_win/VYHRA references remain.
result.contractConcerns: hud.gd now reads Balance.endless_banner_ticks; this var must be added in balance.gd by the slice that owns it, or the HUD draw will error at runtime. fight.gd must be updated to the new 13-arg hud.update() call (old 11-arg call with the bool would now fail).
newSymbols: hud.gd: func update(p_enemy_hp: int, p_enemy_fatigue: int, p_enemy_state: StringName, p_enemy_state_ticks: int, p_player_state: StringName, p_player_state_ticks: int, p_dodge_cd: int, p_combo: int, p_combo_rank: StringName, p_max_combo: int, p_wave: int, p_score: int, p_banner_ticks: int) -> void

result.changesSummary: fight.gd: replaced game_over with endless state (wave/score/banner_ticks); enemy var changed from @onready $Enemy to plain var bound by dynamic spawn; added preloads ENEMY_BASIC/ENEMY_WEAK, ENEMY_SPAWN_POS (456,384), COLOR_CHIP, PARTICLES_CHIP; added _ready() -> _advance_wave(), _spawn_enemy(w) with 1-2 weak / 3-4 basic / 5+ alternating composition plus speed_scale/strong_prob_bonus scaling for w>=5 (queue_free old, add_child, rebind), and _on_enemy_defeated() (kill bonus = endless_kill_score_per_wave * wave, then _advance_wave). _on_tick(): removed game_over early-return; new top = Space reload_current_scene + banner_ticks decrement; exhausted transition gated by enemy.has_fatigue(); win check replaced by _on_enemy_defeated() after both resolves, before _update_hud. _resolve_enemy_swing(): fatigue drain in active parry gated by has_fatigue() (riposte/perfect-parry ungated); both regen lines on player-hit gated by has_fatigue(). _resolve_player_swing(): idle branch now checks enemy.idle_chip_multiplier() > 0.0 for chip damage (int(round(base*chip)) to HP, score += dmg, SHAKE_FATIGUE + hitstop_weak + COLOR_CHIP/PARTICLES_CHIP particles, no combo/riposte/execute/flash, return), strong-in-idle drain gated by has_fatigue(); full-hit branch adds score += int(round(dmg)). _update_hud(): new 13-arg hud.update(... wave, score, banner_ticks) per contract. fight.tscn: removed the [node name="Enemy"] block and the enemy_basic.gd ext_resource line (id 3_enemy); Player/HUD/Background untouched.
result.contractConcerns: fight.gd now depends on symbols owned by other slices: enemy_weak.gd file (preload fails until it exists), Balance.endless_* flats, enemy.has_fatigue()/idle_chip_multiplier()/speed_scale/strong_prob_bonus, and the new 13-arg hud.update(). The project will not run until those slices land. Minor: local var name "script" in _spawn_enemy shadows the built-in Object.script property (GDScript shadowing warning, harmless) — kept verbatim per spec. Spec's chip example says strong chip = 8, but int(round(25*0.34)) = int(round(8.5)) = 9 in GDScript; implemented the formula as specified.

result.changesSummary: combatant.gd: added virtual max_hp() (returns Balance.hp_max) after trigger_flash; damage_hp/heal_hp now clamp with max_hp() instead of Balance.hp_max; var hp declaration left untouched. enemy.gd: added speed_scale (1.0) and strong_prob_bonus (0.0) vars; added capability hooks has_fatigue()->true, idle_chip_multiplier()->0.0, _base_tint()->Color.WHITE, _sprite_sheet()->SPRITE_SHEET, _weapon_sheet()->WEAPON_SHEET (consts kept); _ready() now starts with hp = max_hp() as first statement and builds sprites via _make_sprite(_sprite_sheet())/_make_sprite(_weapon_sheet()); _draw() hp pct uses float(max_hp()) and the fatigue-bar block is wrapped in if has_fatigue():; _update_sprite() final else assigns mod = _base_tint() (priority comment updated); stale header comment about single-enemy-type sheets updated to mention accessors. enemy_basic.gd: _pick_attack uses clampf(Balance.strong_probability + strong_prob_bonus, 0.0, 1.0); _threat_weak/_threat_strong/_recovery_weak/_recovery_strong now return maxi(Balance.endless_*_floor, int(round(Balance.*_ticks / speed_scale))) — bit-identical at speed_scale 1.0; idle/exhausted/stagger/feint accessors unchanged. enemy_weak.gd: NEW file per contract — extends Enemy, Czech+EN header (fatigue-less, chip-through-block, low HP, slow telegraphs, no feints, placeholder-art note), BODY_SHEET preloads res://sprites/skeleton-basic.png (verified file + .import exist), WEAPON_SHEET_WEAK reuses enemy_basic_weapon.png, BASE_TINT Color(0.92, 0.95, 0.82, 1.0), all accessors read Balance.enemy_weak Dictionary with spec defaults, _feint_probability 0.0, speed_scale deliberately ignored.
result.contractConcerns: enemy_weak.gd and enemy_basic.gd depend on the Balance slice landing: Balance.enemy_weak Dictionary and the flat endless_* vars (endless_threat_weak_floor etc.) must exist or these scripts fail at load/runtime. The spec contract wrote _pick_attack/_pick_idle_duration as untyped `(rng_)`; I used the fully typed signatures `(rng_: RandomNumberGenerator) -> StringName/int` matching the base-class virtuals and enemy_basic style (required for valid GDScript override).
newSymbols: enemy_weak.gd (new script extending Enemy: BODY_SHEET, WEAPON_SHEET_WEAK, BASE_TINT + overrides of max_hp, has_fatigue, idle_chip_multiplier, _base_tint, _sprite_sheet, _weapon_sheet, _pick_attack, _pick_idle_duration, _threat_*_ticks, _recovery_*_ticks, _stagger_ticks, _exhausted_ticks, _feint_probability)

result.changesSummary: Synced all five docs to the Endless + Weak Enemy spec. gameplay.md: replaced "Win condition" with "Endless mód" section (kill bonus = endless_kill_score_per_wave(50) x wave, immediate respawn, WAVE banner 24t fade, Space restarts run anytime, combo persists across waves, score = damage dealt + kill bonuses, wave composition 1-2 weak / 3-4 basic / 5+ alternating, basic-only scaling with floors 4/6/2/4 and caps 1.5 / +0.15); added "Enemy: weak (skeleton)" section (hp 70, no fatigue/exhausted/regen/drains, chip table 5/8 = int(round(base*0.34)), chip = score only (no combo/riposte/execute), full damage in recovery/staggered, parry/stagger/riposte intact, timings 14/18/14/22, idle 24-56, strong 5%, no feints, never scales); updated swing-resolve steps 2+4, idle branch, combo rules, FSM summary, Space key, out-of-scope list. plan.md: new _on_tick pseudocode (Space restart + banner countdown + _on_enemy_defeated after both resolves), architecture block (enemy_weak.gd, dynamic spawn at (456,384), static Enemy node removed from fight.tscn, new hud.update 13-param signature, win overlay removed), new capability-hooks table (max_hp/has_fatigue/idle_chip_multiplier/_sprite_sheet/_weapon_sheet/_base_tint/speed_scale/strong_prob_bonus), enemy_weak + endless JSON blocks with bullet tables, Balance.enemy_weak documented as non-flattened Dictionary + flat endless_* vars, HUD/bars paragraph (fatigue bar gated by has_fatigue, WAVE/SCORE/MAX COMBO top-left, gold banner), chip particles (COLOR_CHIP, 4 ks, hitstop_weak, no flash), verification step 8 replaced with endless test + new steps 16-18 (chip, no-fatigue/no-regen, composition+scaling), out-of-scope updated. SPRITES.md: new skeleton-basic.png section (192x32, 6 cells, layout identical to enemy_basic, FLAGGED as byte-identical placeholder copy, weapon reuses enemy_basic_weapon.png, bony BASE_TINT Color(0.92,0.95,0.82,1.0)), new accessor-refactor section (_sprite_sheet/_weapon_sheet/_base_tint done in base), priority list item 5 now _base_tint(), extension guide step 4 rewritten. CLAUDE.md: structure block (enemy_weak.gd, fight.gd wave spawning, hud/balance/sprites lines), per-type-overrides convention extended with capability hooks + Balance.enemy_weak dict + endless_* flats, Space row updated, verify steps 1-18, out-of-scope updated (enemy types in, no win/lose screen, skeleton art placeholder noted). TODO.md: NOTE — the file existed under a broken literal filename "C:\Users\duran\Documents\godot\glamdring\TODO.md" in the project root; moved it to the proper TODO.md path, then added a new "Hotovo (iterace Endless + Weak Enemy)" section ticking off both shipped items, removed the two backlog entries (replaced score item with "Grade za run"), refreshed the recommended-order list. No .gd/.json/.tscn files touched.
